content:
✨ docker-steam-headless | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To easily deploy and run a headless Steam instance within a Docker container for remote game streaming and access.
✨ Key Features: • Headless Steam Client with Proton support • Moonlight compatible server • Web UI with noVNC for browser access • NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPU support • Easy installation of EmeDeck, Heroic, and Lutris via Flatpak
📖 Summary: This repository provides a Docker image for a headless Steam client, enabling remote game streaming. It supports NVIDIA GPU acceleration, web-based access via noVNC, and compatibility with Steam Link, Moonlight, and other game launchers.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
